title: carex norvegica var. stevenii
intro: Carex norvegica var. stevenii, also known as Steven's sedge, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Steven's sedge include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve congestion, and soothe sore throats. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically made into a tea or tincture by infusing the leaves and stems in hot water, which can be used to relieve cold and flu symptoms.
